title: Cuneiform Tablet #0162: Old Assyrian Lexical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a lexical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a lexical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Assyrian period. Lexical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records lexical matters typical of Old Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
